name: Zucchini Quiche
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces grated mozzarella (cheddar, Monterey Jack) cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Saute zucchini and onion in butter until tender.
3. Add parsley and seasonings; mix well.
4. Blend eggs and cheese in a bowl; add vegetable mixture.
5. Separate dough into triangles and arrange in an ungreased 10-inch pie pan, pressing down to form the crust.
6. Spread crust with mustard.
7. Pour vegetable/egg/cheese mixture into the crust.
8. Bake for 18-20 minutes until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean (bake longer if needed).
9. Allow to stand for 10 minutes before serving.
Variations: Add mushrooms and tomato slices just before baking.
